HomePage.title: Rent a car, your way
HomePage.description: Browse the fleet and book in minutes. TanStack Query is wired at the root so you can load vehicles, pricing, and availability anywhere under this layout.

HowItWorks.title: Book a car in three simple steps
HowItWorks.subtitle: Tell us what you need from the hero form—we handle driver matching, pricing, and introductions so you can travel with confidence.
HowItWorks.step1Description: Fill in every field in the booking form above—your details, trip, vehicle choice, and pick-up time—then tap Send.
HowItWorks.step1Bullet1: One form captures your full trip brief
HowItWorks.step1Bullet3: No payment until options are confirmed
HowItWorks.step2Description: Your request appears on our admin dashboard. We reach out to available car providers and drivers, compare willingness to take the trip, and collect their quotes.
HowItWorks.step2Bullet1: Large network of providers and drivers
HowItWorks.step2Bullet2: We negotiate timing and price for you
HowItWorks.step3Description: We phone you with vehicle, driver, and price details. If you agree, the car provider or driver contacts you directly to finalize pickup and trip details.
HowItWorks.step3Bullet2: You choose before anyone is assigned
HowItWorks.step3Bullet3: Direct handoff when you say yes

WhyChooseUs.title: Unmatched quality and service for your journey
WhyChooseUs.feature1Body: From Noah and HiAce to sedans and local rides—pick the vehicle that fits your trip, group size, and budget.
WhyChooseUs.feature2Body: Our team handles your request, coordinates drivers, and stays reachable by phone until you are on the road.
WhyChooseUs.feature3Body: Pick-up and drop-off across the routes we serve—tell us your locations and we match you with available providers.
WhyChooseUs.feature4Body: We work with vetted car providers and drivers so you get clear pricing, verified contacts, and peace of mind.

Faq.title: Everything you need to know about our services

1.question: What do I need to rent a car?
1.answer: Browse our fleet and pick a vehicle that fits your trip. Share your pickup and drop-off locations, travel dates, and contact details in the booking form—we will confirm availability, pricing, and any documents required before you finalize.

2.question: How old do I need to be to rent a car?
2.answer: Minimum age depends on the vehicle and provider—often 21 or 25 for larger or premium cars. Send us your trip details and we will tell you exactly what applies and match you with an eligible option.

3.question: Can I rent a car with a debit card?
3.answer: Some providers accept debit cards; others require a credit card for the security deposit. Tell us your preference when you book and we will align you with a provider whose payment rules work for you.

1.quote: Booking through Chaka Ride was effortless. The driver was on time, the car was spotless, and the whole trip felt safe from pick-up to drop-off.
1.name: Rashida Khan

2.quote: We needed a larger vehicle for a family weekend—Noah was perfect. Clear pricing over the phone and no surprises at the end. Highly recommend.
2.name: Karim Ahmed

3.quote: I use Chaka Ride for airport runs regularly. Reliable, professional, and they always confirm details before the day. Exactly what I need for work travel.
3.name: Nadia Rahman

Footer.brandBlurb: Reliable car rental and transfers—Noah, HiAce, sedans, and more. We match you with vetted drivers and clear pricing for every trip.
Footer.subscribeBlurb: Get updates on fleet offers and travel tips. No spam—unsubscribe anytime.

AboutPage.title: Your trusted ride partner in Bangladesh
AboutPage.intro: Chaka Ride connects travelers with reliable vehicles and vetted drivers across Bangladesh. Whether it is an airport transfer, a family tour, or daily commutes—we make every journey safe, comfortable, and hassle-free.
AboutPage.missionBody: We believe everyone deserves affordable, dependable transportation. Our platform bridges the gap between passengers and quality car providers—handling driver matching, pricing negotiations, and trip coordination so you can focus on the road ahead.
AboutPage.missionHighlight1: Verified drivers and vehicles for every trip
AboutPage.missionHighlight2: Transparent, upfront pricing with no hidden fees
AboutPage.missionHighlight3: Available across all 64 districts of Bangladesh
AboutPage.value1Body: Every driver and vehicle in our network is vetted. We verify documents, inspect cars, and maintain strict safety standards so you travel with confidence.
AboutPage.value2Body: No hidden fees, no surge surprises. We negotiate fair rates with providers and present clear pricing before you confirm any trip.
AboutPage.value3Body: From booking to drop-off, our team stays reachable. We listen, adapt, and go the extra mile to make your experience seamless.
AboutPage.value4Body: Based in Dhaka with deep knowledge of routes across Bangladesh. We understand traffic patterns, road conditions, and the best ways to get you there.
AboutPage.value5Body: We know your time matters. Our drivers arrive punctually, routes are planned ahead, and we keep you updated so there are no last-minute surprises.
AboutPage.value6Body: Clean, well-maintained cars with courteous drivers. Whether it is a business trip or a family outing, we make every ride feel comfortable and special.
AboutPage.ctaBody: Book your next trip in minutes. Tell us where you are going and we will handle the rest.

ContactPage.title: We would love to hear from you
ContactPage.subtitle: Have a question, need a quote, or want to partner with us? Reach out through any channel below and our team will get back to you promptly.
ContactPage.messagePlaceholder: Tell us more about your inquiry...
ContactPage.mapSubtitle: Visit our office or get directions — we are always happy to welcome you.
